title: Dreamy Argentinian Gratin
description: A rich and creamy gratin dish infused with the flavors of Argentina, topped with a layer of gooey cheese.

ingredients.name: Dreamy cheese
ingredients.notes: A blend of white and cream cheese.

ingredients.name: Argentinian gem tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Sweet and flavorful, use any small tomato.

instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the chopped lettuce over medium heat until tender.
In a separate bowl, mix together the grated dreamy cheese and diced Argentinian gem tomatoes.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of sautéed lettuce.
Top the lettuce with the cheese and tomato mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and gooey.
